official_sources.evidence: One Trading instruments expose typed instruments; the current adapter filters to type=SPOT and leaves futures/perpetual out of runtime.

runtime_isolation: One Trading futures/perpetual instruments, positions and margin state need a separate product profile; spot filtering must remain enforced and non-SPOT instruments must not reach spot order parsers.
unsupported_runtime_reason: Official futures/perpetual instruments exist, but this adapter only maps type=SPOT metadata/order books and lacks futures account, position, margin, fee and order lifecycle runtime.
required_auth_and_scope: bearer-token permission audit for futures/perpetual trading
product-scope guard distinct from type=SPOT REST calls
dry-run or sandbox guard before enabling live writes
unsafe_to_promote_without: position, margin and risk parser coverage
write/readback reconciliation for futures/perpetual order lifecycle
runtime_gaps: product-scope guard distinct from spot type=SPOT REST calls
futures/perpetual symbol precision and contract sizing parser
bearer-token permission audit for futures/perpetual trading
write/readback reconciliation for futures/perpetual order lifecycle
dry-run or sandbox guard before enabling live writes
remaining_work: add position, margin and fee readbacks
